title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its breakthrough in reducing inference costs and computational demands despite maintaining performance. The analysis positions V4 as evidence of diverging incentive structures between open-source and closed-lab AI development, particularly regarding efficiency versus raw capability scaling.
